member.name: M:MassTransit.EntityFrameworkAuditStoreConfiguratorExtensions.UseEntityFrameworkCoreAuditStore(MassTransit.IBusFactoryConfigurator,Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilder,System.String,System.Action{MassTransit.IMessageFilterConfigurator})
member.summary: Configure Audit Store against Entity Framework Core
member.param: The DB Context Options configuration builder
Name of the table to store audit records.
Configure messages to exclude or include from auditing.

member.summary: Use an existing (already configured in the container) DbContext that will be resolved within the container scope

member.summary: Creates a DbContext for the saga repository

member.summary: Create a standalone DbContext

member.name: M:MassTransit.EntityFrameworkCoreIntegration.ISagaDbContextFactory`1.CreateScoped``1(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{``0})
member.summary: Create a scoped DbContext within the lifetime scope of the saga repository

member.name: M:MassTransit.EntityFrameworkCoreIntegration.ISagaDbContextFactory`1.ReleaseAsync(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext)
member.summary: Release the DbContext once it is no longer needed

member.name: T:MassTransit.EntityFrameworkCoreIntegration.Saga.OptimisticSagaLockContext`1
member.summary: Defers loading the sagas until the transaction is started

member.name: T:MassTransit.EntityFrameworkCoreIntegration.Saga.PessimisticSagaLockContext`1
member.summary: Queries the list of saga ids prior to the transaction, and then loads/locks them individually

member.name: M:MassTransit.EntityFrameworkCoreIntegration.Saga.SagaLockContext`1.Load
member.summary: Execute the callback on each saga instance, and return a Task that waits on the results

member.summary: Override to configure the primary CorrelationId key, to add things like clustering
